description: Identifies EBS snapshots that are potentially orphaned, stale, over-retained, archive candidates, or missing lifecycle governance. Destructive deletion requires dependency and retention validation.

cost.pricing_source: Static fallback estimate. Prefer AWS Pricing MCP, AWS Pricing API, or cost_report region-specific pricing when available.
cost.note: EBS snapshots are billed for stored snapshot data. Archive tier can reduce long-term storage cost but has restore charges and minimum archive duration considerations.

severity_rules.name: potential_orphaned_snapshot_deleted_volume
severity_rules.condition: SourceVolumeStatus tag == 'deleted' AND no dependency evidence is present
severity_rules.description: Snapshot source volume appears deleted. Treat as a strong cleanup candidate, but verify AMI, launch template, AWS Backup, DLM, legal hold, compliance, and owner dependencies before deletion.
severity_rules.recommendation: Verify AMI, AWS Backup, DLM, legal hold, audit, and DR dependencies before deleting.

severity_rules.name: snapshot_dependency_or_retention_blocker
severity_rules.condition: snapshot referenced by AMI, launch template, AWS Backup, DLM, legal hold, audit, compliance, or DR tag
severity_rules.description: Snapshot has dependency or retention evidence. Do not delete for cost optimization unless the dependency or retention requirement is explicitly removed.
severity_rules.recommendation: Snapshot is referenced by an AMI or backup plan — do not delete.

severity_rules.name: archive_candidate
severity_rules.condition: snapshot_age_days >= archive_candidate_age_days AND retained_for_long_term_backup == true AND restore_frequency_low == true
severity_rules.description: Snapshot appears to be retained long term. Model archive storage, restore charges, restore time, and minimum duration before moving to archive tier.

severity_rules.name: fast_snapshot_restore_review
severity_rules.condition: fast_snapshot_restore_enabled == true AND no recent restore or launch requirement evidence
severity_rules.description: Fast Snapshot Restore can add cost. Disable it when low-latency restore is not required.

severity_rules.name: missing_lifecycle_governance_tags
severity_rules.condition: missing Owner OR Purpose OR RetentionDays OR BackupPolicy tags
severity_rules.description: Snapshot lacks lifecycle governance tags, which makes safe cleanup and retention policy enforcement difficult.

validation_before_delete: Check launch templates, autoscaling groups, image pipelines, and golden image workflows.
Check AWS Backup recovery points and DLM policy ownership.
Check legal hold, audit, compliance, disaster recovery, and retention tags.
Require owner approval for destructive cleanup.
prevention: Use AWS Data Lifecycle Manager or AWS Backup lifecycle expiration.
Require Owner, Environment, Purpose, RetentionDays, BackupPolicy, and CostCenter tags.
Review archive candidates and Fast Snapshot Restore usage monthly.
reporting: Separate confirmed deletion savings, potential deletion savings, archive-tier savings, and FSR savings.
Report confidence based on dependency evidence and retention evidence.
